title: Build configuration
excerpt: description: Set build commands, output directories, and framework presets for Cloudflare Pages projects. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/pages/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. You may tell Cloudflare Pages how your site needs to be built as well as where its output files will be located. You should provide a build command to tell Cloudflare Pages how to build your application. For projects not listed here, consider reading the tool's documentation or framework, and submit a pull request to add it here.
